footer.tagline: Decentralized vault-to-vault lending and NFT rentals. Trustless, transparent, on-chain.
footer.viewDiamondAria: View Diamond contract on block explorer
footer.disclaimer: Vaipakam is a decentralized, non-custodial protocol. No KYC is required. Users are responsible for their own regulatory compliance.

banners.sanctionsMatchLine1: This address is currently listed by the on-chain sanctions oracle (Chainalysis). The protocol cannot create a vault, accept a new deposit, or open a new position for this wallet.
banners.sanctionsMatchLine2: Existing-position close-out paths remain open so the unflagged counterparty can be made whole — borrowers can still repay, lenders can still trigger recovery, and either side can still claim what is contractually owed back to them.
banners.sanctionsMatchLine3: If you believe this is a mismatch, contact Chainalysis support — Vaipakam does not maintain its own sanctions list and cannot override an oracle decision.
banners.sanctionsMatchBody: The on-chain sanctions oracle (Chainalysis) currently lists this address. Any offer-creation or offer-acceptance transaction will revert at the protocol layer. If this is a mis-match, contact Chainalysis support — Vaipakam does not maintain its own sanctions list.
banners.vaultUpgradeBody: Vault upgrade required — the vault is at v{{userVersion}}, mandatory floor is v{{mandatoryVersion}} (latest v{{currentVersion}}). Diamond flows will revert until upgrade.
banners.unsupportedBody: {{state}} (chainId {{chainId}}). Vaipakam runs as a separate Diamond on each supported network — currently live on: {{liveList}}.
banners.unsupportedPendingPlanned: Mainnet rollout to {{pendingList}} is planned for Phase 1.
banners.unsupportedActionsDisabled: Protocol actions are disabled until switching to a supported network.
banners.preflightChecking: Checking on-chain liquidity for this pair…
banners.preflightNoRoute: 0x can't find a route for this collateral → principal pair at the requested size. Liquidations would fall back to the claim-time full-collateral path. Pick a different collateral asset, or proceed knowing the lender's recovery is the raw collateral instead of principal proceeds.
banners.preflightThinPrefix: 0x routed this pair, but with high price impact
banners.preflightThinSuffix: — above the protocol's {{maxSlippage}}% slippage cap. Liquidations may revert and fall back to the claim-time path. Consider smaller collateral amounts or a more liquid asset.
banners.preflightErrorSuffix: . The on-chain liquidity gate still applies.
banners.preflightLiquid: 0x can route this collateral → principal pair within the protocol's slippage cap. Liquidations should settle without falling back.

legalGate.title: One-time Terms acceptance
legalGate.body: Before using the Vaipakam app the protocol's Terms of Service must be reviewed and accepted. This is a one-time signed transaction — acceptance is recorded on-chain, anchored to the wallet, and only has to be re-signed if the Terms change.
legalGate.readTerms: Read the full Terms of Service
legalGate.footnote: Signing costs a small on-chain fee. Approve one transaction from the wallet.

discordPage.title: Join the Vaipakam Discord
discordPage.tagline: Chat with the core team, other lenders and borrowers, swap collateral-strategy notes, and get early signal on new deployments. Moderation follows the same non-custodial, no-KYC ethos as the protocol itself.
discordPage.ctaAria: Open Vaipakam Discord invite in a new tab
discordPage.finePrintSuffix: in a new tab. The Vaipakam team never asks for wallet signatures, seed phrases, or KYC on Discord — anyone who DMs claiming to is impersonating the team.

cardHelp.dashboardYourLoans: Every loan the connected wallet is part of on this chain — as lender, borrower, or both. Each row links to the full position page with HF, LTV, collateral, repay, and claim controls.
cardHelp.dashboardVpfiPanel: VPFI is the protocol token. This card shows the wallet + vault balance on this chain, the share of circulating supply, and the remaining mintable cap. Canonical chain locks/releases; mirror chains mint/burn via Chainlink CCIP CCT.
cardHelp.dashboardFeeDiscountConsent: Opt-in for the protocol to pay discounted fees in VPFI from the vault. Discount scales with the vault VPFI balance: {{tier1Discount}}% at Tier 1 (≥{{tier1Min}} VPFI), {{tier2Discount}}% Tier 2 (≥{{tier2Min}}), {{tier3Discount}}% Tier 3 (≥{{tier3Min}}), {{tier4Discount}}% Tier 4 (>{{tier4Min}}).
cardHelp.dashboardRewardsSummary: View of your platform-interaction rewards — a daily VPFI share for every loan you're part of. Click a row to jump to the full claim card on the matching page.
cardHelp.dashboardAutoLendIntent: Set up passive lending: register a standing intent on an asset pair, fund working capital, and let the protocol keeper fill matching borrower demand under your bounds — and auto-roll repaid loans once you delegate it. Pause, top up, or withdraw any time.
cardHelp.offerBookFilters: Narrow the market lists below by asset, side, status, and other criteria. Filters apply to Lender / Borrower offers — the connected wallet's own active offers (shown above) are always visible regardless.
cardHelp.offerBookYourActiveOffers: Offers the connected wallet created on this chain that haven't been filled yet. Cancel any time before someone accepts; once accepted, the loan lifecycle moves to "Your Loans" on the Dashboard.
cardHelp.offerBookLenderOffers: Offers posted by lenders ready to lend. A borrower accepting one initiates a loan: the borrower's collateral is locked, the principal asset arrives in the borrower's wallet, and interest accrues until repayment. HF must be ≥ 1.5 at initiation.
cardHelp.offerBookBorrowerOffers: Offers posted by borrowers who've locked their collateral and are waiting for a lender. A lender accepting one funds the loan with the principal asset; the lender earns the offer's rate over the duration, less the {{treasuryFee}}% treasury cut on interest.
cardHelp.createOfferOfferType: Pick a side of the market: Lender (lender supplies the principal asset and earns interest) or Borrower (borrower locks collateral and requests principal). Rental sub-type lets NFT owners rent out ERC-721 / ERC-1155-rentable NFTs for a daily fee instead of a loan.
cardHelp.createOfferLendingAssetLender: The principal asset and amount the lender is willing to offer, plus the interest rate (APR in %) and duration in days. Rate is fixed at offer time; duration sets the grace window before the loan can default.
cardHelp.createOfferLendingAssetBorrower: The principal asset and amount the borrower wants from the lender, plus the interest rate (APR in %) and duration in days. Rate is fixed at offer time; duration sets the grace window before the loan can default.
cardHelp.createOfferNftDetails: The NFT being rented out + the daily rental fee. ERC-4907 (ERC-721 rentable) and ERC-1155-rentable standards are supported; the renter pre-pays duration × daily-fee × (1 + {{rentalBuffer}}% buffer) on accept.
cardHelp.createOfferCollateralLender: How much the lender wants the borrower to lock to secure the loan. Liquid ERC-20s (Chainlink feed + ≥$1M v3 pool depth) get LTV/HF math; illiquid ERC-20s and NFTs have no on-chain valuation and require both parties to consent to a full-collateral-on-default outcome.
cardHelp.createOfferCollateralBorrower: How much the borrower is willing to lock to secure the loan. Liquid ERC-20s (Chainlink feed + ≥$1M v3 pool depth) get LTV/HF math; illiquid ERC-20s and NFTs have no on-chain valuation and require both parties to consent to a full-collateral-on-default outcome.
cardHelp.createOfferRiskDisclosuresLender: Acknowledge the risks before signing as the lender. Smart-contract risk; oracle risk (a stale feed can delay liquidation against the principal); liquidation slippage shaves what is recovered; illiquid-collateral defaults transfer the collateral as-is with no recourse if it's worth less than the loan. Vaipakam is non-custodial — no support desk can undo a bad position.
cardHelp.createOfferRiskDisclosuresBorrower: Acknowledge the risks before signing as the borrower. Smart-contract risk; oracle risk (a stale feed can trigger liquidation at a bad moment); liquidations sell the collateral at slippage-eaten prices; illiquid-collateral defaults transfer the collateral to the lender in full with no claim left behind. Vaipakam is non-custodial — no support desk can undo a bad position.
cardHelp.createOfferAdvancedOptions: Fine-tune the offer parameters most users leave at defaults: offer expiry, fee-discount opt-in, and any role-specific options the protocol exposes. Safe to skip on a first offer.
cardHelp.claimCenterClaimsLender: Funds become claimable after a loan settles. The lender claim unlocks the principal back plus accrued interest, less the {{treasuryFee}}% treasury cut on interest. The claim consumes the lender position NFT — once claimed, the loan is done from the lender's side.
cardHelp.claimCenterClaimsBorrower: Funds become claimable after a loan settles. On full repayment the borrower claim returns the collateral; on default or liquidation, only any unused VPFI rebate from the Loan Initiation Fee. The claim consumes the borrower position NFT — once claimed, the loan is done from the borrower's side.
cardHelp.refinanceOverview: Roll an existing loan into a new one without unwinding collateral. The borrower posts a Borrower offer for the refinance terms; once a lender accepts, the protocol atomically pays off the old loan and opens the new one in a single transaction. HF must be ≥ 1.5 on the new terms for the swap to land.
cardHelp.refinancePositionSummary: Snapshot of the loan being refinanced — outstanding principal, interest accrued, current HF/LTV, and the collateral that stays locked across the swap. Use these numbers to size the new offer.
cardHelp.refinanceStep1PostOffer: Step 1 — post a Borrower offer for the new terms (asset, amount, APR, duration, collateral). Other lenders see this in the Offer Book; the old loan stays open and accruing until a lender accepts.
cardHelp.refinanceStep2Complete: Step 2 — once a lender accepts the refinance offer, complete the swap. The protocol atomically (a) repays the old loan from the new principal, (b) opens the new loan, (c) keeps the collateral in the vault throughout. No window where the position is unsecured.
cardHelp.precloseOverview: Close a loan early — before the duration ends. Two paths: Direct (repay the full outstanding balance now) or Offset (sell some collateral to cover the balance, get the remainder back). Useful when the position is no longer wanted open or to free collateral early.
cardHelp.preclosePositionSummary: Snapshot of the loan being closed early — outstanding principal, interest accrued so far, current HF/LTV. Pre-Phase-5 a flat early-close penalty applied; in Phase 5 the time-weighted VPFI rebate / fee math handles it without a separate penalty.
cardHelp.precloseInProgress: An offset preclose is mid-flight — collateral is being sold via the swap router. Complete it (settles the loan from the proceeds) or, if the price moved, cancel and try again at a fresh quote.
cardHelp.precloseChoosePath: Direct: pay the full outstanding balance now from the wallet. Offset: sell part of the collateral on a DEX, use the proceeds to repay, get whatever is left back. Direct is cheaper if the cash is on hand; Offset is the path otherwise.
cardHelp.earlyWithdrawalOverview: Lender-side early-exit. Sell the loan's claim NFT through the protocol before the duration ends. The position NFT (which represents the right to repayment + interest) is auctioned to a buyer; the seller receives the sale proceeds, the buyer takes over the lender side.
cardHelp.earlyWithdrawalPositionSummary: Snapshot of the lender position being exited — principal, accrued interest, time remaining, current HF/LTV of the borrower. These numbers anchor the price the buyer is willing to pay.
cardHelp.earlyWithdrawalInitiateSale: Step 1 — initiate the sale. The protocol lists the lender NFT for the asking price set; once a buyer accepts, the proceeds settle to the seller's wallet and the buyer becomes the new lender of record. Cancellation is allowed before a buyer accepts.
cardHelp.publicDashboardOverview: Aggregated protocol metrics derived entirely from on-chain contract state and event logs across every supported chain. No wallet required, no off-chain database — figures recompute live from the Diamond.
cardHelp.publicDashboardCombined: Top-line totals summed across every supported chain. The chains-covered / chains-unreachable counts indicate whether any RPC failed at fetch time — the per-chain table below shows which.
cardHelp.publicDashboardPerChain: Per-chain split of the same metrics. Useful for spotting which chain is carrying TVL or loan volume, and for confirming that mirror-chain VPFI supplies sum to the canonical lock balance.
cardHelp.publicDashboardVpfiTransparency: On-chain VPFI accounting on this chain: total supply, circulating supply (after subtracting protocol-held balances), and the live mintable cap. Canonical chain locks/releases; mirror chains mint/burn via the CCIP token pool (LockReleaseTokenPool on Base, BurnMintTokenPool on mirrors) so total cross-chain supply stays bounded.
cardHelp.publicDashboardTransparency: Provenance of every figure on this page. Snapshot block, data freshness, the Diamond address each metric was read from, and the exact view function. Any number on this page can be re-derived from the linked block + function call.
cardHelp.keeperSettingsOverview: Keepers are delegated managers of the user's role on a loan. Approving a keeper here delegates only one side, only for the actions authorised. Liquidations, repayments, adding collateral, and claiming stay user-only — keepers cannot touch money-out paths. Up to 5 approved keepers per wallet.
cardHelp.keeperSettingsApprovedList: Each approved keeper carries a bitmask of permitted actions: complete loan sale, complete offset, init early-withdraw, init preclose, refinance. Edit a keeper to flip individual action bits. Removing a keeper revokes the master entry on-chain — they instantly stop being able to act on every loan.
cardHelp.nftVerifierLookup: Before buying a Vaipakam position NFT from another holder, paste the contract address + token ID here. The verifier confirms whether it was minted by Vaipakam, which chain it lives on, the position's current state, and the on-chain owner. The NFT is the bearer instrument for the loan's claim — losing it loses the claim.
cardHelp.alertsOverview: Get a heads-up when the Health Factor falls toward the liquidation threshold. An off-chain watcher polls active loans every 5 min and fires on band crossings — no gas, no on-chain state. Alerts fire once per downgrade; climbing back to healthy re-arms the ladder.
cardHelp.alertsThresholdLadder: The HF bands that trigger alerts. Crossing into a more-dangerous band (e.g. 1.5 → 1.2) fires once. The next alert only fires after another band is crossed. Climbing back above a band rearms it. Defaults are tuned for liquid loans; tune higher when carrying volatile collateral.
cardHelp.alertsDeliveryChannels: Where alerts get delivered — Telegram bot DM and / or Push Protocol wallet notifications. Both rails share the same threshold ladder above; per-channel warn-levels are intentionally not exposed. Enable one or both.
cardHelp.allowancesList: Every ERC-20 approval the wallet has granted the Vaipakam Diamond on this chain. Revoke any approval no longer needed in one click — sets allowance to zero on-chain. Non-zero approvals appear first; the zero rows below are a reference so the list can be confirmed clean.
cardHelp.loanDetailsOverview: Single-loan view. Shows terms, live HF/LTV, collateral, parties, and every action available to the viewer on this loan — repay, claim, liquidate, preclose, refinance — depending on status and role (lender / borrower / third-party liquidator).
cardHelp.loanDetailsTerms: Principal asset, original amount, fixed APR (bps), duration, and the derived interest accrued so far. Terms are immutable once the loan is initiated; refinancing creates a new loan rather than mutating this one.
cardHelp.loanDetailsCollateralRiskLender: The collateral securing the loan + the live Health Factor and LTV. Liquid collateral has oracle-backed valuation and is auto-liquidated when HF drops below 1; illiquid collateral has no on-chain valuation and is transferred to the lender in full on default. Watch HF — when it drops, the lender's protection thins.
cardHelp.loanDetailsCollateralRiskBorrower: The collateral the borrower has locked + the live Health Factor and LTV. Keep HF above 1 — if it drops below, the collateral can be liquidated. Liquid collateral is auto-priced via oracle; illiquid collateral has no on-chain valuation and is transferred to the lender in full on default.
cardHelp.loanDetailsParties: Lender and borrower addresses, the Vaipakam Vault proxies that hold their assets, and the position NFTs each side received at loan-init. Each NFT is the bearer instrument for that side's claim — losing it loses the claim.
cardHelp.loanDetailsActionsLender: Actions available to the lender on this loan. Claim once the loan settles (returns principal + interest, less the {{treasuryFee}}% treasury cut). Initiate Early Withdrawal to sell the lender NFT to a buyer mid-loan. Anyone (including the lender) can trigger Liquidate when HF < 1 or the grace period expires. Disabled actions show a hover reason.
cardHelp.loanDetailsActionsBorrower: Actions available to the borrower on this loan. Repay full or partial; Preclose direct (pay outstanding now) or offset (sell collateral via DEX); Refinance into a new loan with new terms. Claim returns the collateral on full repayment, or any unused VPFI rebate. Disabled actions show a hover reason.
cardHelp.buyVpfiOverview: Deposit VPFI into your Vaipakam Vault to earn a time-weighted discount on protocol fees while it sits there. Deposit and withdraw are explicit on-chain actions on whichever supported chain you connect from.
cardHelp.buyVpfiDiscountStatus: The active VPFI fee-discount tier. Your tier is set by your canonical-chain vault VPFI balance: Tier 1 ≥{{tier1Min}}, Tier 2 ≥{{tier2Min}}, Tier 3 ≥{{tier3Min}}, Tier 4 >{{tier4Min}}. The discount only applies on liquid loans and only while the platform-level consent toggle on the Dashboard is on.
cardHelp.buyVpfiDeposit: Move VPFI from the wallet into the vault on this chain. Always an explicit user action: the protocol never auto-funds the vault. Required to qualify for fee discounts. Permit2 is used when available so a single signature replaces the approve + transfer pair.
cardHelp.buyVpfiUnstake: Move VPFI from the vault back to the wallet on this chain. On the canonical chain this reduces your discount tier in real time — the time-weighted accumulator re-stamps every open loan at the new (lower) balance immediately; on other chains the local balance returns to your wallet without changing your tier.
cardHelp.rewardsClaim: Mints any pending VPFI from the interaction reward stream into the wallet, on the current chain, in one transaction. The interaction pool finalizes daily — pending interaction rewards become claimable shortly after each settlement window closes.
cardHelp.activityFeed: On-chain events involving the connected wallet on the active chain — offers created or accepted, loans, repayments, claims, liquidations, NFT mints/burns, VPFI vault deposits/withdrawals. Sourced live from Diamond event logs (no backend), grouped by transaction and ordered newest-first.

vpfiDiscountConsent.title: Fee-discount consent
vpfiDiscountConsent.bodyPrefix: When enabled, the protocol may deduct VPFI from the vault to pay the discounted fee on both the borrower Loan Initiation Fee and / or the lender Yield Fee. The discount scales with the vault VPFI balance — {{tier1Discount}}% off at Tier 1 (≥ {{tier1Min}} VPFI), {{tier2Discount}}% at Tier 2 (≥ {{tier2Min}}), {{tier3Discount}}% at Tier 3 (≥ {{tier3Min}}), and {{tier4Discount}}% at Tier 4 (> {{tier4Min}}). Acquire and deposit VPFI on

lenderDiscountCard.borrowerTitle: Borrowing a liquid ERC-20? Earn up to a {{maxDiscount}}% VPFI rebate on the initiation fee
lenderDiscountCard.borrowerBody1: Hold VPFI in the Vaipakam Vault and enable the one-time platform-level VPFI consent on the Dashboard. The protocol pulls the full {{loanInitiationFee}}% initiation fee up front in VPFI, then credits back a time-weighted rebate at proper loan close (repay / preclose / refinance) based on how long the borrower held VPFI across the loan. Default or liquidation forfeits the rebate. Need VPFI?
lenderDiscountCard.lenderTitle: Lending a liquid ERC-20? Earn up to a {{maxDiscount}}% VPFI discount on the yield fee
lenderDiscountCard.lenderBody1: Hold VPFI in the Vaipakam Vault and enable the one-time platform-level VPFI consent on the Dashboard. At settlement, the {{treasuryFee}}% treasury cut on interest earned is reduced by a time-weighted VPFI discount across the loan's lifetime — up to {{maxDiscount}}%, so the lender keeps more of the interest earned. Nothing is paid up front; the discount is applied automatically when the loan settles properly (repay / preclose / refinance). Default or liquidation forfeits the discount. Need VPFI?
lenderDiscountCard.routingNote: (buy from a preferred chain — routing is handled).
lenderDiscountCard.tiersDifferAlertPrefix: At settlement the treasury cut on this loan's yield is reduced by the time-weighted average
lenderDiscountCard.tiersDifferAlertSuffix: rate. Topping up VPFI just before repay won't capture the full current-tier discount — only the share proportional to how long it was held during the loan.
lenderDiscountCard.consentMissingBody: You haven't given consent to use deposited VPFI for fee discounts on this loan. The discount tier is opt-in — until you enable it on the Dashboard, the yield-fee on settlement will be charged at the full {{treasuryFee}}% with no VPFI rebate.
lenderDiscountCard.consentEnabledNoVpfiBody: You've given consent, but no eligible VPFI is currently deposited in your vault on this chain. Top up VPFI to start earning a time-weighted discount on the yield fee.
lenderDiscountCard.minHistoryPendingTitle: Your tier is aging — almost there
lenderDiscountCard.minHistoryPendingBody: You have VPFI deposited, but the protocol needs a minimum holding history before it activates your tier. Once the window completes, your effective tier will switch on automatically. No action needed; you can keep using the protocol normally.

stakeVpfiCta.title: Deposit VPFI
stakeVpfiCta.managedOnBaseSubtitle: Your VPFI fee-discount tier is resolved from your vault balance on {{canonicalName}}. You can deposit on any supported chain, but only your {{canonicalName}} balance lifts your tier — switch there to raise it, or check your current tier.
stakeVpfiCta.noStakeYetBody: Deposit VPFI on this chain to start earning a discount on the protocol's yield fee. Higher tiers unlock higher discounts; the current thresholds are listed on the VPFI Vault page.
stakeVpfiCta.tierPendingBody: Your deposit qualifies for a tier, but mirror chains haven't been notified yet. Click below to push the update; the protocol pays the cross-chain fee.
stakeVpfiCta.pokeButtonIdle: Push my tier to mirrors now

vpfiTokenCard.title: VPFI Token (this chain)
vpfiTokenCard.canonicalTip: Canonical chain — the VPFIToken contract and the LockReleaseTokenPool live here. Cross-chain bridges lock the canonical supply on the way out and release it on the way back; total supply is fixed at this chain.
vpfiTokenCard.mirrorTip: Mirror chain — VPFI on this chain is a 1:1 representation of the canonical supply. The BurnMintTokenPool mints tokens here when a bridge transfer arrives and burns them when a transfer leaves, so the mirror balance is always backed by canonical-chain locks.
vpfiTokenCard.notRegistered: VPFI is not yet registered with the Diamond on {{chain}}. Once the admin calls setVPFIToken, balances and activity will appear here.
vpfiTokenCard.vaultTooltip: VPFI currently deposited in the Vaipakam Vault on this chain. Your fee-discount tier is set by your canonical-chain vault balance.
vpfiTokenCard.shareTooltip: Effective ownership of this chain's VPFI supply — wallet balance plus vault-locked balance, divided by circulating. Vault VPFI is still owned by the user; it's just locked for the fee-discount tier.
vpfiTokenCard.noActivity: No VPFI transfers touch this wallet on {{chain}} yet. User-facing distributions (rewards) arrive in a later rollout phase.

vpfiVaultCards.mirrorTierBanner: You're on a mirror chain. Your fee-discount tier is set by your vault balance on {{canonical}} and is mirrored here via cross-chain propagation. To actually discount a loan on this chain you must (1) enable the discount consent here and (2) hold enough protocol-tracked VPFI in this chain's vault to cover the loan's fee — otherwise the loan settles at the full fee. To change your tier, manage VPFI on {{canonical}}.
vpfiVaultCards.vaultHeldOnMirror: Lets you use your discount on this chain — your tier is set by your balance on {{canonical}}.
vpfiVaultCards.inactiveBelowTier1: Inactive · below Tier 1 ({{tier1Min}} VPFI in the vault)
vpfiVaultCards.depositGapAchieved: The vault balance qualifies for {{tier}} on the next loan. Ensure the discount consent is enabled above.
vpfiVaultCards.enableSharedConsent: Enable the shared discount consent on the <dashboardLink>Dashboard</dashboardLink>.
vpfiVaultCards.depositMore: Deposit {{amount}} more VPFI into vault to reach Tier {{tier}} ({{discount}}).
vpfiVaultCards.exceedsVaultBalance: Amount exceeds the vault VPFI balance of {{balance}} VPFI.
vpfiVaultCards.depositSubtitle: Required on every chain — including the canonical one.
vpfiVaultCards.depositSpecNote: By spec, transferring VPFI into vault is always an explicit user action. The protocol never auto-funds the vault after a buy or bridge.
vpfiVaultCards.unstakeSubtitle: Move VPFI from the vault on {{chain}} back to the wallet. On the canonical chain, dropping below a tier threshold lowers your discount; on other chains your tier is unaffected.
vpfiVaultCards.unstakeWarning: Your fee-discount tier is set by your canonical-chain vault balance. Withdrawing on the canonical chain can drop your tier if the remaining balance falls below a threshold; withdrawals on other chains return held VPFI without changing your tier.

alertsPage.subtitle: Get a heads-up when the Health Factor (HF) drops toward the liquidation threshold. The off-chain watcher polls active loans every 5 minutes and alerts on band crossings — no gas, no on-chain state. Alerts fire once per downgrade; recovering to a healthier band re-arms the ladder.
alertsPage.thresholdLadderBody: A fresh alert fires the first time HF crosses each band downward. Once a band fires it re-arms after HF recovers above the next higher band's threshold. Default values are conservative — adjust to taste.
alertsPage.warnDescription: First heads-up — plenty of runway still.
alertsPage.alertDescription: Meaningful — take a look at adding collateral or repaying.
alertsPage.criticalDescription: Liquidation imminent — HF < 1.00 triggers it on-chain.
alertsPage.deliveryChannelBody: Enable one or both. Both rails share the threshold ladder above — different warn-levels per channel are not supported.
alertsPage.telegramBody: Universal — no wallet plug-in required. Handshake: request a code here, DM it to the bot, confirmation arrives back in Telegram.
alertsPage.pushBody: On-chain notification channel delivered to Push-enabled wallets (Rabby, Push Wallet, MetaMask with Push Snap). Two steps: (1) enable the rail here so the watcher dispatches Push notifications for the wallet, and (2) subscribe to the Vaipakam channel from a Push-enabled wallet so the notifications actually land.
alertsPage.telegramHandshakeBody: DM this code to the Vaipakam alerts (@VaipakamBot) bot within 10 minutes:
alertsPage.eventCategoriesBody: Choose which loan events trigger a notification. Health-factor (HF) bands above are always on once any rail is enabled. The toggles below default ON for new subscribers — opt out of any individually.
alertsPage.eventClaimAvailableDesc: You have funds you can pull from the Claim Center — repaid principal/interest, post-default proceeds, or a VPFI rebate.
alertsPage.eventLoanTerminalDesc: Your loan reached a terminal state — fully repaid, time-defaulted, or HF-liquidated. Both lender and borrower-side notify.
alertsPage.eventLoanInitiatedCreatorTitle: Your offer matched into a loan
alertsPage.eventLoanInitiatedCreatorDesc: Sent to the offer creator when their offer is accepted (or matched by a bot) and the loan goes Active.
alertsPage.eventMaturityApproachingDesc: Proactive heads-up a few days before your loan's due date so you can prepare repayment or roll into a refinance.
alertsPage.eventPartialRepayReceivedDesc: Lender-side: a borrower paid down some principal/interest mid-loan. Lets you reconcile incoming flows without watching the dashboard.
alertsPage.pushFeeBody: Push delivery costs the protocol's notification channel gas to broadcast. We recoup that as a flat $2 USD-equivalent (governance-tunable) deducted from your VPFI vault on the FIRST paid notification per loan-side. Subsequent notifications on the same loan-side are free for you. Telegram is always free.

allowancesPage.subtitle: Every ERC-20 approval granted to the Vaipakam Diamond by the connected wallet on this chain. Revoke ones no longer needed in one click. Non-zero allowances appear first; zero-allowance rows below are a reference so the list can be confirmed clean.
allowancesPage.footnote: This page only scans the Vaipakam Diamond as the spender on the current chain. Approvals to other contracts (DEX aggregators, other dApps) are not listed here — use revoke.cash or a similar tool to audit them.

assetPicker.tokenDiscoveryUnavailable: Token discovery is not available on this network (testnet). Paste the contract address manually.
assetPicker.invalidAddress: Enter a valid 0x contract address (40 hex chars).
assetPicker.stablecoinNotRecognized: This address is not recognized by CoinGecko. The prepayment asset for NFT rentals must be a stablecoin from the list above.
assetPicker.notStablecoin: {{symbol}} is not categorized as a stablecoin on CoinGecko. Choose a stablecoin from the dropdown.
assetPicker.tokenNotListed: This token is not listed on CoinGecko. Use only if the project is trusted, and verify the contract address.
assetPicker.tokenOutsideTop200: {{symbol}} is outside the top 200 by market cap{{rankSuffix}}. Use only if the project is trusted, and verify the contract address.

offerBookPage.connectBody: Connect your wallet to browse and accept offers on Vaipakam.
offerBookPage.subtitleOpenPrefix: Ranked outward from the market anchor
offerBookPage.subtitleClosed: Historical view of filled offers — accepted liquidity that's already been matched to a loan. Use this to see past market rates even after the live book clears.
offerBookPage.tokenDiscoveryUnavailable: Token discovery is not available on this network (testnet). Paste the contract address manually.
offerBookPage.noOpenBody: There are no open offers on the book. Be the first to create one!
offerBookPage.noOpenFiltered: No offers match the active filters. Try widening them or loading more.
offerBookPage.noClosedFiltered: No filled offers match the active filters. Try widening them or loading more.
offerBookPage.rescanTooltip: Rescan the chain for offers if the list looks stale.

keeperPicker.permissionInitiateEarlyWithdrawalDesc: Creates the sale offer on the lender side.
keeperPicker.permissionCompleteEarlyWithdrawalDesc: Finalises the lender-side sale after a matching borrower accepts.
keeperPicker.permissionInitiatePrecloseDesc: Covers direct preclose, Option 2 obligation transfer, Option 3 offset offer creation.
keeperPicker.permissionCompleteOffsetDesc: Finalises the Option 3 offset flow after a new borrower takes on the obligation.
keeperPicker.permissionInitiateRefinanceDesc: Triggers a refinance against a matching borrower offer.
keeperPicker.permissionAutoExtendDesc: Extends an active loan in place when both you and the lender have pre-approved extend caps. Pays the accrued interest from your vault automatically.
keeperPicker.permissionSignedFillDesc: Lets this keeper fill your keeper-gated standing lend intents against matching borrower demand, within the bounds you set. Only used when you mark an auto-lend intent as keeper-only.
keeperPicker.permissionAutoRollDesc: Lets this keeper redeploy a fully-repaid standing-intent loan straight back into your intent capital, with no manual claim. Required for hands-off auto-lend.
keeperPicker.actionsUnreadableHint: This keeper's on-chain permissions couldn't be read just now. Editing is disabled to avoid overwriting them with a guessed value — refresh the page and try again.
keeperPicker.whitelistFull: Whitelist full. Revoke an entry to add a new keeper.

autoLifecycleLoanCaps.title: Auto-lifecycle caps for this loan
autoLifecycleLoanCaps.body: Pre-approve keeper-driven refinance and in-place extension on this loan. The protocol enforces these caps; outside them, the actions revert.
autoLifecycleLoanCaps.nftCollateralWarning: ⚠️ This loan's collateral is an NFT. If no compatible refinance offer is found before the grace period ends, your NFT will transfer in full to the lender (no market swap, no surplus). Auto-refinance is best-effort, not a guarantee. Consider repaying directly instead.
autoLifecycleLoanCaps.bestEffortWarning: ⚠️ Auto-refinance and auto-extend are best-effort. If no compatible counterparty consent is found before this loan's grace period ends, the loan may be liquidated. You remain responsible for monitoring and repaying manually if needed.
autoLifecycleLoanCaps.preGraceWarning: ⚠️ This loan enters its grace period in ~{{hours}}h. Auto-refinance is best-effort — if no compatible lender offer is matched before grace expires, your loan will default. Repay manually or tighten your refinance caps if the market has moved.
autoLifecycleLoanCaps.refinanceHint: When enabled, the dapp may post a refinance-tagged borrower offer on your behalf, and a keeper may then refinance this loan if a matching lender offer fits below your rate ceiling and within your expiry cap. If no compatible offer is found before grace, your loan defaults — review T-092-C pre-grace warnings.
autoLifecycleLoanCaps.extendBorrowerHint: Your half of the consent to extend this loan in place. The lender must also opt in for the extension to fire.
autoLifecycleLoanCaps.extendLenderHint: Your half of the consent to extend this loan in place. The borrower must also opt in for the extension to fire.
autoLifecycleLoanCaps.alertsSubscriptionCTA: Set up Telegram or Push alerts so you'll be warned if no compatible refinance offer is found before your grace period ends.

autoLifecycleSettings.title: Auto-lifecycle
autoLifecycleSettings.body: Borrower convenience: pre-set your refinance offer terms so every new loan can auto-populate them, and allow in-place loan extensions when both sides have pre-consented. (Auto-lend now lives in its own card below — it's wired to standing lender intents.)
autoLifecycleSettings.adminDisabled: Admin has temporarily disabled this option on this chain. You can still disable an existing opt-in.
autoLifecycleSettings.autoLendLabel: Auto-post lender offers when I deposit
autoLifecycleSettings.autoLendHint: When vault deposits land, the dapp posts a standing lender offer under your cap terms. The matcher picks it up if a compatible borrower offer exists; nothing else happens unless a match fires.
autoLifecycleSettings.optInLabel: Auto-set refinance offer terms on every new loan
autoLifecycleSettings.optInHint: Borrower convenience. Every new ERC20-principal loan auto-populates its refinance offer terms from your defaults; NFT-collateral loans require explicit per-loan opt-in (asymmetric default-loss risk).
autoLifecycleSettings.bestEffortWarning: ⚠️ Auto-refinance is best-effort. If no compatible lender offer is found before your loan's grace period ends, the loan may be liquidated. You remain responsible for monitoring and repaying manually if needed.

autoLend.title: Auto-lend (standing intent)
autoLend.body: Register a standing lend intent on an asset pair and fund working capital. The protocol keeper fills matching borrower demand under your bounds and — once you delegate it — auto-rolls fully-repaid loans straight back into your capital, with no manual claim round-trip. You stay in control: pause, top up, or withdraw any time.
autoLend.fillPathOff: Intent filling is paused by admin on this chain. You can register and fund now; the keeper starts filling automatically once it's re-enabled.
autoLend.consentRevokedTag: consent marker revoked (this intent is still active & fillable — use Withdraw & stop to fully stop it)
autoLend.requiresKeeperAuthLabel: Restrict fills to my delegated keeper only (otherwise any solver may fill, within your bounds)
autoLend.fundAmountLabel: Amount to fund now (optional — pulled from your wallet)
autoLend.noKeeperHere: No keeper is published for this chain yet, so auto-roll delegation is unavailable here. You can still register and fund an intent; the keeper auto-fills it. Auto-roll needs the delegation step, which appears once a keeper address is configured.
autoLend.noticeConsentBlocked: Auto-lend consent is currently disabled by admin, so nothing was set up — no intent was registered, delegated, or funded. Please try again once it's re-enabled.
autoLend.noticeEnabled: Auto-lend is set up. The keeper will fill matching demand under your bounds.
autoLend.noticePaused: Auto-lend paused — the intent is de-listed so no new fills happen. Your funded capital stays reserved: click Enable to resume (no re-funding needed) or Withdraw & stop to retrieve it.
autoLend.noticeStopped: Auto-lend stopped. Your un-lent capital has been withdrawn and the intent cancelled.
autoLend.noticeStoppedKeeper: Auto-lend stopped — your un-lent capital was withdrawn and the intent cancelled. The keeper still holds your auto-lend permissions (harmless with no funded intent); if you have no other standing intents, you can revoke them on the Keeper Settings page.
autoLend.reservedCapital: {{capital}} of funded capital is still reserved from a paused intent. Click Enable to resume lending it, or Withdraw & stop to return it to your wallet.
autoLend.revokeConsentHint: Clears your wallet-level auto-lend opt-in for all pairs. Doesn't touch any intent or capital — use Pause / Withdraw & stop for those.
autoLend.noticeConsentRevoked: Auto-lend consent revoked for your wallet. Any standing intents you still have are unaffected; manage them per pair above.
autoLend.wrongChain: Switch your wallet to this chain to manage auto-lend.
autoLend.errPickPair: Pick a lending asset and a collateral asset.
autoLend.errBadAddress: Enter valid token contract addresses for both assets.
autoLend.errVpfiLending: VPFI can't be the lending asset of an auto-lend intent (you can still use it as collateral).
autoLend.errKeeperListFull: Your keeper list is full (5). Remove a keeper on the Keeper Settings page before enabling auto-lend here.
autoLend.errSamePair: Lending and collateral assets must differ.
autoLend.errExposure: Max exposure must be greater than zero.
autoLend.errMinFill: Min fill size must be greater than zero and at most max exposure.
autoLend.errLtv: Max init LTV must be between 0% and 100%.
autoLend.errDuration: Max term must be at least one day.
autoLend.errFundOverExposure: Amount to fund can't exceed your max exposure.
autoLend.errKeeperOnlyNoKeeper: No keeper is published on this chain, so a keeper-only intent could never be filled. Uncheck "restrict fills to my delegated keeper" to allow permissionless fills.
autoLend.errRiskConsent: Please review and accept the risk disclosures before enabling auto-lend.
autoLend.errAckKeeperMaster: Please acknowledge that enabling auto-lend turns on keeper access for your wallet.
autoLend.ackKeeperMasterLabel: Enabling auto-lend turns ON keeper access for your wallet — this reactivates EVERY keeper you've approved (not just the auto-lend keeper). I understand.
autoLend.errNoToken: Couldn't load the lending token — check the address.

consent.dismissAria: Dismiss — we'll ask again next visit
consent.title: Your privacy choices
consent.body: We use cookies and similar technologies to run essential parts of the app (session state, anti-abuse) and — with permission — to understand how Vaipakam is used so it can be improved. The choice can be changed at any time from the "Cookie settings" link in the footer.
consent.categoryEssentialDesc: Required for the app to function — session state, wallet connection, anti-abuse. Cannot be disabled.
consent.categoryAnalyticsDesc: Anonymous usage stats that help understand which features matter and where flows break.
consent.categoryPersonalizationDesc: Remembers UI preferences across visits (beyond the essentials).
consent.categoryAdvertisingDesc: Ad measurement and targeting. Vaipakam does not currently serve ads, but this covers any future ad-measurement pixels.

interestWarning.earlyWithdrawalBody: By selling your lender position now, you give up all interest accrued so far on this loan. The forfeited amount goes to the protocol treasury, or — if the new lender offers a lower rate — is applied toward the rate shortfall first. You walk away with the principal you funded (minus any shortfall to the new lender), but not the interest earned to date.
interestWarning.precloseDirectBody: Closing the loan now via the Direct path requires you to pay the FULL TERM interest as if the loan ran to maturity — not just the interest accrued so far. There is no early-close discount on this path. The lender receives 99% of that interest; 1% goes to the protocol treasury.
interestWarning.precloseTransferTitle: You'll pay accrued interest plus a rate shortfall
interestWarning.precloseTransferBody: Transferring the obligation to a new borrower requires you to pay the interest accrued to date plus a shortfall — the difference between what the lender expected to earn over the remaining term at your original rate and what they will earn from the new borrower's offer. If the new offer matches your rate, the shortfall is zero.
interestWarning.precloseOffsetTitle: You'll pay accrued interest plus shortfall, and lock new principal
interestWarning.precloseOffsetBody: The Offset path settles your loan against a fresh lender offer that you create. Up front you pay the interest accrued so far plus any rate shortfall to the original lender, and you must deposit fresh principal as collateral for the offset offer. Your borrower-side NFT is locked until a new borrower accepts the offer or you cancel it.
interestWarning.refinanceTitle: Old loan closes at full-term interest plus shortfall
interestWarning.refinanceBody: Refinancing repays the old lender with principal plus FULL TERM interest (not just accrued) plus any rate shortfall — payable when the new offer's expected interest is lower than the old loan's. You're effectively paying as if the old loan reached maturity, in exchange for the new terms.

transferLockWarning.preconfirmBodyLender: Submitting this transaction will lock the lender-side Vaipakam NFT #{{tokenId}} from transfer and approval until this {{flow}} flow completes or is cancelled. While locked, the NFT cannot be moved to another wallet, listed, sold, or approved on any marketplace, and its ownership-driven actions remain bound to this in-progress flow.
transferLockWarning.preconfirmBodyBorrower: Submitting this transaction will lock the borrower-side Vaipakam NFT #{{tokenId}} from transfer and approval until this {{flow}} flow completes or is cancelled. While locked, the NFT cannot be moved to another wallet, listed, sold, or approved on any marketplace, and its ownership-driven actions remain bound to this in-progress flow.
transferLockWarning.preconfirmCrossRoleNote: Note: this caller is acting as the current NFT holder — the lock applies to whoever owns the NFT at submission time.
transferLockWarning.activeBody: This position NFT is currently locked by an in-progress {{reason}} flow. It cannot be transferred or approved until the responsible flow completes or the linked offer is cancelled.

riskDisclosures.title: Risk Disclosures
riskDisclosures.checkboxLabel: I understand and agree to the Risk Disclosures and <terms>Vaipakam Terms</terms>.
riskDisclosures.consentRequiredHint: Please check the agreement above to continue.
riskDisclosures.paragraph1: I understand that in case of market abnormalities or for any other reason liquidation cannot execute safely, the lender may receive collateral in-kind — that is, the collateral asset itself — instead of the lending asset. If oracle pricing is unavailable, or if the loan uses illiquid assets, the lender may receive all collateral regardless of market value and the borrower receives nothing.
riskDisclosures.paragraph2: By proceeding, you acknowledge that recovery may be less than the asset lent, that the lender may receive a different asset than the one lent, and that no further claim exists against the borrower, Vaipakam, its contributors, or any third party. This acknowledgement is recorded on-chain for this position.

settings.title: Settings
settings.modeInfo: Basic hides advanced pages and controls like keeper settings. Switch to Advanced once you're comfortable with the core lending flow.

dataRights.title: Your data rights (GDPR / UK GDPR / CCPA)
dataRights.subtitle: Export or erase the data Vaipakam stores in your browser. On-chain positions are never affected — Vaipakam has no power to erase blockchain state.
dataRights.downloadBody: Exports every Vaipakam-namespaced key from your browser as a portable JSON file. Covers:
dataRights.downloadBullet1: Journey-log telemetry (sessionStorage — last few minutes of UI events for support diagnostics).
dataRights.downloadBullet3: Cached event index (per-chain offer / loan IDs the app re-uses to avoid full chain re-scans).
dataRights.deleteBody: Removes every Vaipakam-namespaced key from your browser. Click once to arm the action; click again on the now-red button to confirm.
dataRights.deleteEffect1: The cookie / consent banner returns on the next page load.
dataRights.deleteEffect2: Your local activity-log buffer is wiped (no support diagnostics until new events accumulate).
dataRights.deleteEffect3: Cached event indexes are cleared — the next dashboard / offer-book load re-scans the chain from scratch (slower than usual).
dataRights.deleteEffect4: Theme, language, mode (basic/advanced) and any other Vaipakam-namespaced preferences reset to defaults.
dataRights.deleteOnChainNote: On-chain positions, loans, and balances are unaffected. Vaipakam cannot erase blockchain state.
dataRights.deleteConfirmCta: Click again to confirm — this is irreversible
dataRights.journeyBody: Saves the in-memory journey-log buffer (UI events from this tab's session) as a JSON file. Useful for sharing in a Discord DM or support thread. Independent of the broader Download / Delete above — those touch your stored namespace; this captures only the live event buffer.
dataRights.legalFooter: Vaipakam acts as data controller for the items above. We do not maintain any server-side personal data (no accounts, no email lists, no analytics linked to your wallet). For audit purposes we record every UI error event server-side with a per-event UUID — see the Privacy Policy for what's captured.

dashboard.connectBody: Connect your wallet to view your dashboard, active loans, and positions.
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your lending and borrowing positions
dashboard.noLoansBody: Create an offer or browse the offer book to get started.
dashboard.claimReadyTooltip: This loan has unclaimed funds for you — open it to see the breakdown and claim.
dashboard.nearInternalMatchTooltip: This loan's LTV is within 5% of its liquidation threshold — a keeper bot may match it against another borrower's loan and clear it. Top up collateral or repay to avoid the match window opening.

offerBook.noClosedBody: No offers have been filled on this chain yet — once someone accepts an offer, it'll appear here.
offerBook.claimReadyTooltip: This loan has unclaimed funds for you — open it to see the breakdown and claim.

marketRateWidget.title: Lend / Borrow at market rate
marketRateWidget.noMarketRateHint: No market rate yet for this pair — you'd be posting the first offer
marketRateWidget.minCollateralPrompt: Enter a lending amount to see the minimum collateral
marketRateWidget.illiquidCollateralHint: This asset isn't on a liquid market — set collateral terms on the offer page
marketRateWidget.footnote: Opens Create Offer with the rate, amount and minimum collateral pre-filled — you confirm there. The minimum collateral is the smallest that keeps the loan's health factor at the protocol floor (1.5); you can raise it, not lower it.

liquidityNotice.thinCollateralOnChain: ⚠ This collateral asset has thin liquidity on this chain. If it gets liquidated here the swap may be costly or fail — and this asset may be much deeper on another chain. Consider using the chain where it has more liquidity.

createOffer.marketWidgetBanner: Posting at the current market rate (≈ {{rate}}% APR) for this pair. Review and adjust the terms below before confirming.
createOffer.firstOfferBanner: No market rate exists for this pair yet — you'd be posting the first offer. Set the interest rate below.
createOffer.marketWidgetIlliquidBanner: ⚠ This pair includes an asset without a liquid market (no oracle price). The protocol can't auto-compute a minimum collateral or run the standard health-factor / LTV checks here — you and your counterparty price this directly and both must consent. Set all terms below.
createOffer.connectBody: Connect your wallet to create offers on Vaipakam.
createOffer.successBody: Your offer has been submitted on-chain and a Vaipakam position NFT has been minted.
createOffer.subtitleLender: Create a lending offer — specify what you want to lend and your terms.
createOffer.subtitleBorrower: Create a borrowing offer — specify what you need and the collateral you can provide.

validate.amountNonPositive: Amount must be greater than zero.
validate.durationOutOfRange: Duration must be between {{min}} and {{max}} days.
validate.riskAndTermsConsentRequired: You must agree to the abnormal-market liquidation fallback terms before creating an offer.
validate.amountMaxBelowMin: Maximum amount cannot be smaller than the minimum.
validate.rateMaxBelowMin: Maximum interest rate cannot be smaller than the minimum.
validate.collateralAmountMaxBelowMin: Maximum collateral cannot be smaller than the minimum.

createOffer.hintAssetTypeAuto: Auto-detected from the lending-asset contract address. Paste or pick an address below to populate this.
createOffer.hintCollateralAssetTypeAuto: Auto-detected from the collateral contract address.
createOffer.hintNftAddressManual: Enter the NFT collection's contract address manually.
createOffer.hintAddressLocked: Pinned to the original loan — the settlement reverts on a mismatch.
createOffer.hintAmountTokens: Amount in whole tokens (scaled on-chain using the token's decimals)
createOffer.hintAmountMax: Optional ceiling — bots can match any amount in [min, max]. Leave blank for a single-amount offer.
createOffer.hintInterestRateMax: Optional ceiling — bots match at the midpoint of the overlapping rate range. Leave blank for a single rate.
createOffer.prepayAssetHint: Stablecoin used for rental fee prepayment + {{rentalBuffer}}% buffer
createOffer.lockAssetsAlert: Creating an offer will lock the assets in the Vaipakam Vault and mint a Vaipakam position NFT. The accepting party pays gas to initiate the loan.
createOffer.lifLenderBody: When the offer is accepted, {{loanInitiationFee}}% of the lending amount will be routed to the Vaipakam treasury before the borrower receives the remaining {{borrowerNet}}%. The borrower still repays the full principal.
createOffer.lifBorrowerBody: When the request is funded, {{loanInitiationFee}}% of the lending amount will be routed to the Vaipakam treasury before the borrower receives the remaining {{borrowerNet}}%. The borrower still repays the full principal.
createOffer.keeperAccessLabel: Enable authorized keeper / third-party execution access
createOffer.keeperAccessHintMid1: flag only. By itself it is
createOffer.keeperAccessHintMid2: sufficient — before any keeper can act on the offer creator's behalf the creator must
createOffer.keeperAccessHintSuffix: enable keeper access and add the keeper to the whitelist in the advanced profile (Keepers page). Keeper authority is role-scoped: the offer creator's own profile opt-in + whitelist govern only the actions the creator's side is entitled to.
createOffer.allowsPartialRepayHintLender: When enabled, the borrower can call repayPartial on the resulting loan to pay down principal in chunks before the term ends. Default off — when off, only full repayment is accepted on-chain.
createOffer.allowsPartialRepayHintBorrower: Request the right to repay this loan in partial chunks. The lender consents implicitly by accepting your offer; if they don't want partial repay they will skip it. Default off.
createOffer.allowsParallelSaleLabel: Allow optional sale of this NFT on OpenSea
createOffer.allowsParallelSaleHint: Borrow OR sell — opting in marks this offer as eligible for a parallel-sale listing. The listing itself is published separately by calling the diamond's `postParallelSaleListing` once the offer is live (a dedicated in-app flow is queued as a follow-up). If a buyer fills the listing before any lender accepts, the sale proceeds land in your vault and the offer closes. If a lender accepts first, the listing (once published) carries through the loan and any later buyer fill automatically settles the loan from the sale proceeds (lender gets their promised interest, you keep the surplus). Only on Borrower offers with NFT collateral. Forces all-or-nothing fill mode.
createOffer.refinanceTargetHint: Tag this offer to refinance one of your existing active loans. The keeper-driven refinance path enforces the per-loan refinance caps you set on LoanDetails; the offer must satisfy your rate ceiling and the protocol auto-forces AON fill mode. Leave empty for a standard borrower offer.
createOffer.refinanceTargetBestEffortWarning: ⚠️ Tagging this offer for refinance doesn't guarantee a match. If no compatible lender accepts before your existing loan's grace period ends, your loan will default. Auto-refinance is best-effort — review your caps on the LoanDetails page.

periodicInterest.label: Payment cadence
periodicInterest.hintShort: Pick a cadence to require interest settlement at fixed intervals during the loan. Larger principals (above the configured threshold) unlock finer cadences. If a borrower misses a period after the grace window, anyone can call a settler that sells just enough collateral to cover the shortfall.
periodicInterest.hintMultiYear: Multi-year loans require at least Annual settlement. The borrower must pay each year's accrued interest by the year-end checkpoint, or after the grace window anyone can sell collateral to cover the shortfall — possibly triggering broader liquidation.

periodicInterest.title: Next interest checkpoint — {{cadence}}
periodicInterest.pastGraceHint: Anyone can now sell collateral on your behalf to cover this period's interest. Pay before that happens to avoid the swap fee + treasury handling cut.

loanDetails.connectBody: Connect your wallet to view loan details, repay, claim, or manage your position.

lien.title: Collateral backing this loan
lien.lenderNote: The borrower's collateral backing this loan is locked in their vault for the life of the loan — provable directly on-chain.
lien.borrowerNote: This collateral is locked until you repay, refinance, or default. Direct withdrawals of the locked amount revert until the loan closes.
lien.unavailable: Lien status unavailable — couldn't verify the collateral lock on-chain right now. Refresh to retry.

loanDetails.repayPrepaySaleMessage: Your loan has already been settled — a buyer filled your OpenSea prepay listing in the same block, paying the lender + treasury and sending the remainder directly to the wallet that holds your borrower position NFT (no claim step needed). Your repay didn't go through (no funds moved); you don't need to retry.
loanDetails.fallbackPendingAlertPrefix: Liquidation swap failed and this loan is in
loanDetails.fallbackPendingBorrower: Borrower may still cure it by repaying in full, or by adding collateral until Health Factor and LTV return to their initiation thresholds.
loanDetails.fallbackPendingLender: Borrower may still cure the position (full repay or collateral top-up) until the lender finalizes the claim.
loanDetails.repayDescBorrower: Repay the principal + interest in full to close the loan and release the collateral.
loanDetails.repayDescOther: Anyone can repay this loan on behalf of the borrower (full repayment only).
loanDetails.repayNonBorrowerWarning: Repaying this loan does not grant collateral rights. Collateral is claimable only by the current holder of borrower NFT #{{tokenId}}.
loanDetails.repayConfirmBody: This will repay principal plus accrued interest for the full outstanding balance and close (or cure) the loan.
loanDetails.repayConfirmReminderBody: repaying this loan does not grant collateral rights. Collateral is claimable only by the current holder of borrower NFT #{{tokenId}}.
loanDetails.addCollateralFallbackDesc: Top up collateral to cure the fallback. The loan reactivates once Health Factor and LTV are back within their initiation thresholds.
loanDetails.addCollateralNormalDesc: Add more collateral to improve the Health Factor and avoid liquidation.
loanDetails.liquidateHfDesc: This loan is undercollateralized. Any wallet may liquidate — collateral is swapped to principal across the best-priced DEX and the lender is made whole. The liquidator collects an incentive (up to 3% of proceeds, tapering with realized slippage).
loanDetails.triggerDefaultDesc: This loan is overdue. Anyone can trigger the default process.
loanDetails.earlyWithdrawalDesc: Exit this loan before maturity by selling the lender position to a new lender. Initiating this flow will lock the lender NFT from transfer until the sale completes or is cancelled.
loanDetails.precloseDesc: Close this loan early by repaying directly, or by offsetting with a new lender offer. The offset path will lock the borrower NFT from transfer until the new offer is accepted or cancelled.
loanDetails.refinanceDesc: Switch to a new lender with better terms by posting a borrower offer and completing the refinance once accepted.
loanDetails.noKeepersWhitelistPrefix: No keepers on the global whitelist.
loanDetails.noKeepersWhitelistLink: Add one on the Keeper Settings page →
loanDetails.noKeepersWhitelistSuffix: before enabling any for this loan.
loanDetails.keeperHintPrefixA: A keeper still needs (a) the corresponding action bit set on the
loanDetails.keeperHintSuffix: and (b) the master keeper-access switch ON before they can drive anything on this loan.
loanDetails.illiquidRiskExplainer: LTV / HF aren't computed for loans involving an illiquid asset (no on-chain price). On Borrower default, the full collateral is transferred in-kind to the lender.

banner.title: Live NFT collateral listing
banner.graceClosedHint: The grace window has closed. The executor rejects fills past grace, so the order is no longer executable on-chain — even though it may still be visible on OpenSea until someone (you, the borrower, or a permissionless caller) cancels it.

actions.postDesc: Post a Seaport order that lets a buyer purchase your collateral and pay your loan off in a single transaction. The proceeds first cover the lender (principal + interest) and the treasury cut; whatever's left refunds to you.
actions.updateDesc: Re-sign with a new ask price or conduit. The borrower-position NFT lock stays on across the update — buyers who already saw the old order will see it invalidated.
actions.askBelowMinWarning: Ask is below the live floor + buffer. The transaction will revert.
actions.invalidSalt: Salt must be a valid uint256 (decimal or 0x-hex).
actions.updateConduitHint: This listing's conduit address is {{conduit}}. The on-chain event only stores the resolved address — re-enter the conduit key you used so the update doesn't silently switch conduits.
actions.unavailableFeatureDisabled: The prepay-listing feature is currently disabled on this chain by governance. Check back later — already-posted listings can still be cancelled.
actions.unavailableFeatureDisabledCanCancel: Prepay listings have been disabled by governance. You can still cancel this listing; post / update are blocked until the master switch is flipped back on.
actions.unavailableBufferUnconfigured: The prepay-listing buffer has not been configured on this chain yet. Posting will be available once governance sets a non-zero buffer.
actions.unavailableBufferUnconfiguredCanCancel: The prepay-listing buffer is not configured. You can still cancel this listing; post / update are blocked until a buffer is set.
actions.unavailableNftLocked: Your borrower-position NFT is currently locked by another flow (preclose offset or early-withdrawal sale). Finish or cancel that flow before posting a listing.
actions.unavailableNftLockedCanCancel: Your borrower-position NFT is locked by another flow. You can still cancel this listing; updates are blocked until the other lock clears.
actions.cancelOnlyPastGrace: The grace window for posting new or updated listings has closed. You can still cancel this listing to release the borrower-position-NFT lock.
actions.cancelOnlyLoanClosed: This loan is no longer active, but a prepay-listing row is still on the indexer. Cancel it to release the on-chain order hash and the borrower-position-NFT lock.
actions.cancelConfirmBody: Cancelling releases the borrower-position-NFT lock and invalidates the order on-chain. Buyers who already saw it on OpenSea will see the order disappear once they refresh.

tokenInfoTag.trustWarning: Anyone can deploy a token with any symbol — confirm you trust this token by checking the contract address itself, not the symbol shown.

vpfiVault.title: VPFI Vault & Discounts

preconnect.tagline: Pay lower fees on your loans by holding VPFI in your vault.
preconnect.discountBody: VPFI you hold in your Vaipakam Vault earns you a time-weighted discount on Vaipakam's protocol fees — applied automatically when each loan settles, no separate claim step:
preconnect.discountBullet1: Lenders: a discount on the treasury cut taken from interest earned. The more VPFI you've held across the loan's lifetime, the smaller the cut.
preconnect.discountBullet2: Borrowers: a VPFI rebate on the loan-initiation fee, paid back at proper close (repay / preclose / refinance). Default forfeits the rebate.
preconnect.howBody: Deposit VPFI into your Vaipakam Vault. Your deposited balance unlocks the tiered fee discount on liquid loans.
preconnect.analyticsHint: Looking for protocol-wide stats and circulating supply? See the

vpfiVault.connectBody: Connect your wallet to deposit or withdraw VPFI. The same page handles both — your wallet decides which action you can take.
vpfiVault.unsupportedNetworkBody: The VPFI vault is available on any supported Vaipakam chain. Your wallet is currently on a network that does not host a Vaipakam Diamond. Switch to a supported chain to continue.
vpfiVault.pageSubtitle: Deposit VPFI into your canonical-chain vault to unlock the tiered discount on protocol fees for your liquid loans.
vpfiVault.step2Info: Depositing is open to everyone — you don't need a loan to participate. Your fee-discount tier is set by your vault balance on the canonical chain, so deposit there to raise it (deposits on other chains are held in your vault but don't change your tier). First time? Your Vaipakam Vault is created for you automatically on your first deposit — no setup needed.

claimCenter.connectBody: Connect your wallet to view and claim your funds.
claimCenter.pageSubtitle: Claim your funds and collateral from completed, repaid, or defaulted loans using your Vaipakam NFT.
claimCenter.scanning: Scanning your loans for claimable funds…
claimCenter.noClaimableFundsBody: You have no pending claims. Funds become claimable after a loan is repaid, defaulted, or settled.

activity.pageSubtitle: On-chain events involving your wallet — offers you created, loans you opened, repayments, claims, and liquidations. Sourced directly from Diamond event logs on {{chain}} and grouped by transaction so multi-event flows (like "Accept offer → Initiate loan") read as one row.
activity.connectBody: Activity is filtered to events your connected address took part in. Connect to see your history.
activity.noActivityBody: Transactions like creating an offer, opening a loan, or claiming rewards will appear here once they settle on-chain.
activity.noFilterMatchBody: Try the "All" chip to widen the view.

loanTimeline.title: Activity timeline
loanTimeline.subtitle: Every on-chain event that touched this loan, in order. Each row shows the event's amount and split where applicable.
loanTimeline.noEvents: No on-chain events for this loan yet.
loanTimeline.retryFailed: Failed — fell back to collateral split

claimActionBar.subtitle: This loan is settled. Pull your funds out of the protocol's claim vault.

rewardsSummary.title: Your VPFI rewards
rewardsSummary.freshUserHint: You haven't earned any VPFI rewards yet. Deposit VPFI in your vault to unlock fee discounts, or take a loan to start accruing platform-interaction rewards.
rewardsSummary.stakingSubtitle: Earn the protocol APR on VPFI sitting in your vault.
rewardsSummary.interactionSubtitle: Earn a daily VPFI share for every loan you participate in.

interactionRewards.title: Platform-interaction VPFI rewards
interactionRewards.subtitle: Every USD of interest settled on a loan you participated in earns you a daily share of the interaction-rewards pool, paid in VPFI.
interactionRewards.waitingTooltip: Day {{day}}'s cross-chain global denominator hasn't been broadcast to this chain yet. Claim is blocked at the protocol layer until it lands; usually finalizes within minutes.

allowances.connectBody: Connect your wallet to view allowances.
allowances.switchChainBody: Switch to a supported chain to view allowances.
allowances.pageSubtitle: Every ERC-20 approval the connected wallet has granted the Vaipakam Diamond on this chain. Revoke any you no longer need in one click. Non-zero approvals appear first; the zero-allowance rows below are a reference so you can confirm the list is clean.
allowances.noTokens: No tokens to check on this chain. Take a loan or create an offer to populate this list with your interacted assets.
allowances.footnote: This page scans only the Vaipakam Diamond as spender on the current chain. Approvals granted to other contracts (DEX aggregators, other dApps) aren't listed here — use revoke.cash or a similar tool to audit them.

alerts.connectBody: Connect your wallet to configure HF alerts.
alerts.switchChainBody: Switch to a supported chain to configure alerts for your loans.
alerts.pageSubtitle: Get a heads-up when your Health Factor (HF) falls toward the liquidation threshold. The off-chain watcher polls your active loans every 5 minutes and alerts on band crossings — no gas, no on-chain state. Alerts fire once per downgrade; climbing back to healthy re-arms the ladder.

nftVerifier.pageSubtitle: Verify the authenticity of a Vaipakam position NFT before you buy it from another holder. Paste the contract address and token ID from the marketplace listing — we'll confirm whether it was minted by Vaipakam, which chain it lives on and the position's current state with NFT's current Owner, so you can decide whether to purchase.
nftVerifier.contractAddressHint: Paste the NFT collection address from the marketplace. The Verifier checks it against every Vaipakam deployment to confirm the NFT is genuine and tell you which chain it sits on.
nftVerifier.loanContextUnavailable: Historical loan context isn't available in the local event index (the mint may predate the scan range).
nftVerifier.burnedNoLoanInitiated: This NFT was minted when the creator posted the offer and was burned when the offer was {{status}}. No loan was ever initiated through this specific tokenId, so there is no loan-side history to show.
nftVerifier.doNotPurchaseBurned: Do not purchase. A burned NFT has no claim rights and cannot be transferred.
nftVerifier.burnedHeader: — the position NFT is destroyed and the token ID can never be reused or transferred.

loanFlow.borrowerOnlyRefinance: Only the current holder of the borrower-side Vaipakam NFT can refinance this loan.
loanFlow.borrowerOnlyPreclose: Only the current holder of the borrower-side Vaipakam NFT can preclose this loan.
loanFlow.lenderOnlyEarlyWithdrawal: Only the current holder of the lender-side Vaipakam NFT can initiate early withdrawal for this loan.
loanFlow.notActiveRefinance: This loan is not active. Refinance is only available on active loans.
loanFlow.notActivePreclose: This loan is not active. Preclose is only available on active loans.
loanFlow.notActiveEarlyWithdrawal: This loan is not active. Early withdrawal is only available on active loans.

refinance.pageSubtitle: Replace the current lender with a new one offering better terms. Works as a two-step flow: post a Borrower Offer, then complete the refinance after a new lender accepts it.
refinance.phase1Erc20Only: Refinance is only supported for ERC-20 loans in Phase 1.

preclose.pageSubtitle: Close this loan before maturity: pay directly, transfer the obligation to an existing Borrower Offer, or offset with a new lender offer (borrower NFT locked until complete).
preclose.offsetTooltipPhase1: Offset path is ERC-20 only in Phase 1
preclose.directPrecloseDesc: Pay principal plus full-term interest now. The loan closes immediately and the borrower's collateral becomes claimable. No Vaipakam NFT lock — this path is atomic.
preclose.transferReviewBody: Confirm moves the loan obligation to the new borrower atomically: the borrower repays accrued interest + any rate shortfall + treasury fee, the new borrower's collateral (already locked in their vault) backs the live loan, and the original collateral becomes claimable — all in one transaction. No NFT transfer-lock is required.
preclose.transferIntroBody: Pick an existing Borrower Offer from the Offer Book and hand off this loan to its creator. Contract-enforced rules (PrecloseFacet.transferObligationViaOffer):
preclose.transferRuleSameAssets: Same lending, collateral, collateral-type, and prepay asset as this loan
preclose.transferRuleAmountEqual: Offer amount must equal this loan's principal exactly
preclose.transferRuleDurationLte: Offer duration ≤ remaining days on this loan
preclose.transferRuleNewBorrower: New borrower must be a different address and pass sanctions / KYC
preclose.offsetIntroBody: Post a new lender offer linked to this loan. As soon as a replacement borrower accepts it, the offset completes atomically in the same transaction — the original collateral is released and the original loan closes with no extra click. The borrower-side Vaipakam NFT will be locked for transfer from submission until completion or cancellation.
preclose.requiredCollateralLabel: Required collateral (whole tokens, same asset as original)
preclose.amountWholeTokensHint: Amount in whole tokens (scaled on-chain using the token's decimals).

earlyWithdrawal.pageSubtitle: Sell the lender position to a new lender. The lender-side Vaipakam NFT will be locked for transfer while the sale is pending.
earlyWithdrawal.phase1Erc20Only: Lender-side sale is only supported for ERC-20 loans in Phase 1. NFT-rental lender positions cannot be sold through this flow.
earlyWithdrawal.saleIntroBody: Set a new interest rate that a replacement lender will see on the sale offer. A new lender can then accept the offer from the Offer Book. The lender forfeits accrued interest to treasury on completion.

publicDashboard.pageSubtitle: Transparent, aggregated protocol metrics derived entirely from on-chain contract state and event logs. No wallet required.
publicDashboard.perChainSubtitle: Metrics below are scoped to the selected chain — no wallet required. If a wallet is connected, it is also asked to switch networks so any subsequent writes land on the same chain.
publicDashboard.aggregatingCombined: Aggregating metrics from every deployed chain…

keeperSettings.title: Keeper Whitelist
keeperSettings.advancedOnlyBody: Keeper management is an advanced feature. Switch to Advanced using the mode toggle in the top bar to delegate role-scoped execution of your loan actions to trusted keeper addresses.
keeperSettings.connectBody: Connect your wallet to manage keepers.
keeperSettings.switchChainBody: Switch to a supported chain to manage keepers.
keeperSettings.pageSubtitle: Keepers are delegated managers of your role. Approving a keeper delegates only your side of a loan, and only for the specific actions you authorise. A lender's keeper with just "Complete early withdrawal" can finish an early-withdraw sale you initiated, but cannot start one on your behalf. Liquidations, repayments, adding collateral, and claiming stay user-only — keepers cannot touch money-out paths. You may whitelist up to {{max}} keeper addresses.
keeperSettings.perLoanGatesAlert: Two additional gates apply per-loan. Even after you approve a keeper here, they can only act on a specific loan when (a) your master keeper-access switch below is ON and (b) you've explicitly enabled them for that loan on the Offer Book or Loan Details page.
keeperSettings.facetUnavailable: Keeper whitelist is not enabled on the currently deployed Diamond (the keeper facet hasn't been cut in yet). Management is disabled until the deployment includes it.
keeperSettings.masterAccessBody: One-switch emergency brake — disables every whitelisted keeper on every loan without touching the allowlist.

periodicInterest.calloutBody: By accepting you agree that the borrower must pay each period's accrued interest by the period close. If the borrower misses the period beyond the configured grace window, anyone can trigger a settler that sells just enough collateral to cover the shortfall — possibly affecting the loan's health factor and triggering further liquidation.

The annotation appears only when an anchor is available for the current filters.
